hypothesis: Surface rules (NO-specific lede, CMI 4-stage, named staff proof, mandatory proof in every section) generalise from FAQ format to continuous prose service pages (single-service, H1 format, 500-800 words). Evidence: blog 9/10 (exp_3), FAQ 9/10 (exp_8). Hypothesis: same rules applied to continuous prose — where CMI structure maps to paragraphs not Q&A pairs — will score 9/10, confirming rules are format-agnostic across written web content types. No surface changes.
changes_description: No surface changes — testing generalisation of existing rules to continuous prose service page format. Output: orgs/glv/clients/reyco/deliverables/web-copy/outboard-motor-service.md. ~700 words, 5 prose sections, CMI 4-stage in paragraph form. NO-specific lede: Lake Superior ice-out timing. Named staff in 4/5 sections. Proof in every section.
